display_text: Enchantress Aghanim's Scepter: Little Friends — Counters high-mobility and escape mechanics by rooting an enemy unit. Transforms Enchantress into a teamfight initiator by forcing all nearby creeps to attack the rooted target, creating additional pressure and area denial.
search_text: Enchantress Aghanim Scepter counter-mobility escape root teamfight initiation area denial

display_text: Enchantress Aghanim's Shard: Sproink — Counters projectile-based damage and crowd control by dodging incoming projectiles. Enhances her kiting potential and survivability by leaping backward and launching Impetus attacks, repositioning her safely while maintaining damage output.
search_text: Enchantress Aghanim Shard counter-projectile projectile-dodge kiting survivability repositioning
